meaning: adj.可怕的,可憎的,令人厌恶的
examples: We spent a week in a gruesome apartment in Miami.
The stag's skull balanced on the pillar reminds us of the gruesome train of events that follows from this moment.
Some of the stories are even more gruesome.
Keep the gruesome stuff because it makes the game dark and scary and wonderful.
Their hope is to simply recognize their loved one in the gruesome slide show.
